issues.description: Condition missing: 'If you have 1 or less Life cards' requires condition type 'HasRestingDon' or custom life threshold check. Current 'Always' ignores the life requirement entirely.
Spurious effect: Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and DrawCard action has no basis in card text. This should be removed entirely.
Action type 'Rest' is incorrect for 'set up to 1 of your Characters with a cost of 5 or less as active'. Should use 'Activate' or equivalent (not 'Rest', which means the opposite).
